paper_object: audited negative case study for a small claimed gain in training-free DLM revision
allowed_claims: CARD-84 shows a localized GSM8K signal against the compute-matched DNB-84 baseline.
That localized signal does not cleanly separate from budget-matched random targeting.
Entropy may be described as a risk marker, not as a validated targeting rule.
The current evidence is limited to the audited slice and current-only artifacts.
forbidden_claims: entropy-guided revision reliably improves DLM reasoning
CARD-84 is the winning inference method
this work establishes a new protocol paradigm
the method almost works / is a near-win
required_disclosures: CARD-84 failed the stricter sham-control gate against RAND-84
trajectory addon was skipped by the negative pivot
runtime contract is a logged stable eager path, not a performance contribution
